---
layout: page
title: Online training set-up
output:
  md_document:
    variant: gfm
    preserve_yaml: true
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

```{r echo=FALSE}
source("R/functions.R")
```

If you are attending one of our online training courses then your trainer will
be in contact via email prior to the course beginning. Any prerequisites will
be set out in this correspondence.
